evidence: "Fascinating period of our history; may watch again soon."
"Just plain awful, and I love historical, romantic stories."
"This coulda been great, if the writers woulda cared about the fascinating history of Jamestown."
"I completely agree with the reviewer who said this is Bramwell with a lobotomy."
"I made it through the first episode, but may only continue due to mild curiosity."
"This production of Far From the Madding Crowd is excellent, consisting of fine acting by a well-chosen cast."
"Whoever decided to cancel it gets a ZERO star."
"I wish I had not viewed this disgusting end to a previously well done show."
"Into the Deep is one of the most moving and memorable documentaries I have ever seen."
"Great outdoor scenes and a beautiful soundtrack."
"It is an incredible production, which is extremely moving, heartbreaking and memorable."
"This is a great version of Far From the Madding Crowd, although I was disappointed that a few of my favorite lines and scenes were deleted."

summary: The user has a strong preference for historical dramas with high production quality and emotional resonance. They express dissatisfaction with narratives that lack historical accuracy and complexity, often favoring slower-paced storytelling. Overall, they appreciate well-crafted adaptations and are sensitive to the quality of acting and scenery.
